item.name: Product

response.name: GetProducts

request.description:
Success -> CreatedAtAction  
Exception -> BadRequest

- product name empty
    
- categoryid of uomid <=0
    
- image null indien het wel gevraagd was (requireImage)
    
- image bestaat indien het niet gevraagd was (!requireImage)

response.name: CreateProduct (!requireImage but provided)
response.body: Image should not be provided when requireImage is false

response.name: CreateProduct (requireImage but not provided)
response.body: Image is required when requireImage is true
